commands.name: help
commands.description: Show help information and available commands
workflow: Show help for specific command if provided

commands.name: info
status
commands.description: Show status of all services and systems
workflow: Check Docker container status if services=true

commands.name: clean

confirmation.message: This will clean:{{#if cache}} build caches{{/if}}{{#if node}} node_modules{{/if}}{{#if python}} Python caches{{/if}}{{#if docker}} Docker resources{{/if}}. Continue?

commands.responseTemplate:
🧹 **Cleanup Complete!**

{{#if cache}}✅ **Build Caches**: Cleaned
{{/if}}{{#if node}}✅ **Node.js**: Cleaned
  - node_modules
  - package-lock.json
  - npm cache
{{/if}}{{#if python}}✅ **Python**: Cleaned
  - __pycache__
  - .pytest_cache
  - *.pyc files
{{/if}}{{#if docker}}✅ **Docker**: Cleaned
  - Stopped containers
  - Dangling images
  - Unused volumes
{{/if}}

---
💾 **Space Reclaimed**: {{spaceReclaimed}}

commands.name: init
commands.description: Initialize or reset the project setup

confirmation.message: This will initialize the project{{#if full}} with full cleanup{{/if}}.{{#if services}} Docker services will be started{{/if}}. Continue?

workflow: Install dependencies (bun install, npm ci, pip install)
commands.responseTemplate:
✨ **Project Initialized!**

{{#if cleaned}}✅ **Cleaned**: Previous setup removed
{{/if}}✅ **Dependencies**: Installed
  - Bun: Linting tools
  - npm: Frontend dependencies
  - pip: Python dependencies
{{#if envCreated}}✅ **Environment**: .env file created
{{/if}}{{#if services}}✅ **Services**: Docker containers started
{{/if}}

---
🚀 **Ready to go!**

Run `/status` to verify everything is working.
Run `/help` to see available commands.

commands.name: update
version
echo
workflow: Repeat message specified number of times

commands.name: time
workflow: Get current time in specified format
